title: Hull Damage in AX Engagements
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM HullDamage WHERE Health < 0.5 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} critical hull damage event(s) below 50% integrity recorded during the report period. Getting hulled during an AX engagement carries a visceral danger that NPC combat rarely matches — caustic damage, lightning tendrils, or a direct interceptor strike that puts you firmly in the rebuy threat zone.
details.help: HullDamage Health < 0.5 flags events where hull dropped into the critical red zone. total drives the title as the near-death encounter count.

tagLines: Critical hull damage events compiled. Sub-50% hull integrity incidents noted in the combat record.
Below 50% hull in Thargoid space is where the music changes and the decisions become expensive.
Every entry here was a moment where the outcome could have been a rebuy screen. You're still here.
